functions.title: Guide Book #28
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #28§r
§lBamboo Tumblers§r
 
•Empty Bamboo Tumbler
•Bamboo Tumbler with Water
•Bamboo Tumbler with Milk
•Bamboo Tumbler with Chocolate
•Bamboo Tumbler with Sweet Berry Juice
•Bamboo Tumbler with Glow Berry Juice

§lEmpty Bamboo Tumbler§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lFuel§r: 2
•§lPlaceable§r: YES
•§lUsed to craft§r: Bamboo Tumbler with Water, Bamboo Tumbler with Milk,

Bamboo Tumbler with Chocolate, Bamboo Tumbler with Sweet Berry Juice, Bamboo Tumbler with Glow Berry Juice.
•Can be used to contain drinkable liquids.

§lBamboo Tumbler with Water§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lObtainable by interacting§r: Empty Bamboo Tumbler on Jar with Water or Evaporator with Water.
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 16
•§lPlaceable§r: YES

•§lDrinkable§r: YES
•§lFood nutrition§r: 0
•§lUsed to craft§r: Bamboo Tumbler with Chocolate Drinks.
•§lUsable in§r: Empty Jar, & Jar with Water §o§8(Half)§r.

§lBamboo Tumbler with Milk§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lObtainable by interacting§r: Empty Bamboo Tumbler on Jar with Milk.
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 16
•§lPlaceable§r: YES
•§lDrinkable§r: YES

•§lFood nutrition§r: 1
•§lRemove status effect§r: Poison Effect, Nausea Effect, Weakness Effect, Levitation Effect.
•§lUsed to craft§r: Jar with Milk
•§lUsable in§r: Empty Jar, Jar with Milk §o§8(Half)§r.
•§lCan heal§r: Mossy Skeleton

§lBamboo Tumbler with Chocolate§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lObtainable by interacting§r: Empty Bamboo Tumbler on Jar with Chocolate.
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 16
•§lPlaceable§r: YES

•§lDrinkable§r: YES
•§lFood nutrition§r: 1
•§lRemove status effect§r: Slowness Effect.
•§lUsed to craft§r: Jar with Chocolate.
•§lUsable in§r: Empty Jar, Jar with Chocolate §o§8(Half)§r.

§lBamboo Tumbler with Sweet Berry Juice§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lObtainable by interacting§r: Empty Bamboo Tumbler on Jar with Sweet Berry Juice.
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 16
•§lPlaceable§r: YES

•§lDrinkable§r: YES
•§lFood nutrition§r: 1
•§lRemove status effect§r: Hunger Effect
•§lUsed to craft§r: Jar with Sweet Berry Juice.
•§lUsable in§r: Empty Jar, Jar with Sweet Berry Juice §o§8(Half)§r.

§lBamboo Tumbler with Glow Berry Juice§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
